---
title: "The Literature and Romance of Northern Europe, constituting a complete History of the Literature of Sweden, Denmark, Norway and Iceland"
---

## The Literature and Romance of Northern Europe, constituting a complete History of the Literature of Sweden, Denmark, Norway and Iceland

**Author:** William Howitt
**Date:** 1852
**Imprint:** London: Colburn

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
